product_overview: OrçaFácil is a web application to create, customize and manage quotes/estimates with integrated client management, onboarding, and PDF generation. The app uses Supabase for auth and data storage and provides an opinionated UI for streamlining quote creation and approvals.
core_goals: Streamline creation and approval of quotes with a guided UI and PDF export
Provide robust client management (B2C and B2B) and a reusable service catalog
Onboard new users quickly with a wizard that seeds company data and templates
Ensure secure authentication and profile management via Supabase
Deliver in-app support and notifications for operational transparency

features.name: Authentication (Login, Signup, Password Reset)
features.description: Secure account creation, login, and password recovery using Supabase Auth with client-side validation and server-side actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill Email field -> Fill Password field -> Click Sign up button -> See onboarding wizard at /onboarding
Navigate to /login -> Fill Email field -> Fill Password field -> Click Login button -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill Email field -> Click Send reset link button -> See confirmation message 'Password reset email sent'
Navigate to /signup -> Fill Email field with invalid format -> Fill Password field -> Click Sign up button -> See validation error 'Enter a valid email'
Navigate to /login -> Fill Email field -> Leave Password field empty -> Click Login button -> See validation error 'Password required'
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill Email field for non-existent account -> Click Send reset link button -> See error 'Email not found' or generic failure message

features.name: Onboarding Wizard
features.description: Guided multi-step setup for new accounts that seeds company details, default services and templates into the user workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Fill Company name field -> Fill Company address field -> Click Continue button -> Fill Default service selection -> Click Finish button -> See redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /onboarding -> Fill Company name field with invalid characters -> Click Continue button -> See inline validation error on Company name field
Navigate to /onboarding -> Fill required fields -> Click Finish button -> Network request fails -> See error message 'Unable to complete onboarding, try again'

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Main overview page showing business metrics, quick actions (new quote, new client), and global search for quick navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See business metrics and recent activity list -> Click New Quote quick action -> Navigate to /quotes/new
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use Global search field -> Enter client name -> See filtered results
Navigate to /dashboard -> No metrics available for new account -> See empty state with CTA 'Create your first quote' -> Click CTA -> Navigate to /quotes/new

features.name: Clients (CRUD)
features.description: Create, read, update and delete client records including both individual (B2C) and corporate (B2B) fields such as CNPJ and company registration data.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> Click New Client button -> Navigate to /clients/new -> Fill Client name field -> Fill Contact email field -> Fill corporate identifier field (if company) -> Click Save button -> See new client in /clients list
Navigate to /clients -> Click a client row -> Navigate to /clients/[id] -> Click Edit button -> Update phone field -> Click Save button -> See updated client details
Navigate to /clients -> Click New Client button -> Fill required fields with duplicate company registration number -> Click Save button -> See error 'Client with this registration already exists'
Navigate to /clients -> Select a client -> Click Delete button -> Confirm deletion -> See client removed from list

features.name: Quotes (Creation, Editing, PDF Generation)
features.description: Full-featured quote editor with itemized services/products, payment options, warranty box, customization fields, status updates and PDF export for sharing with clients.
user_flows: Navigate to /quotes -> Click New Quote button -> Navigate to /quotes/new -> Select existing client -> Click Add Item -> Fill Item description -> Fill Quantity field -> Fill Unit price field -> Click Add Item button -> Configure Payment options -> Toggle Warranty box -> Click Save Quote button -> See quote in /quotes list with status 'Draft'
Navigate to /quotes -> Open a quote -> Click Edit button -> Update item quantity -> Click Save button -> See updated totals on quote detail page
Navigate to /quotes -> Open a quote -> Click Generate PDF button -> See PDF generation progress -> Receive downloadable PDF file
Navigate to /quotes/new -> Attempt to save without adding any items -> Click Save Quote button -> See validation error 'Add at least one item to the quote'
Navigate to /quotes -> Open a quote -> Click Generate PDF button -> PDF generation server action fails -> See error 'Unable to generate PDF, try again'

features.name: Profile & Settings
features.description: Manage user and company profile data, update billing and registration information used across the app and in generated quotes.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> See current user and company information -> Click Edit button -> Update Company address -> Click Save button -> See success toast 'Profile updated'
Navigate to /profile -> Edit Company registration number field with invalid format -> Click Save button -> See validation error on registration number field
Navigate to /profile -> Upload new company logo -> Click Save button -> See updated logo in header and on generated PDFs

features.name: Notifications & Support
features.description: In-app notification center for quote events and an integrated support widget and ticketing system for user help requests.
user_flows: From any page -> Click Notifications icon -> See list of recent notifications -> Click a notification about quote approval -> Navigate to /quotes/[id]
From any page -> Open Support widget -> Fill Subject field -> Fill Description field -> Click Submit ticket button -> See confirmation 'Ticket submitted' and new ticket in /support
Open Support widget -> Fill fields -> Click Submit ticket button -> Network request fails -> See error 'Unable to submit ticket, try again'
From any page -> Receive in-app notification about new message -> Click notification -> See support ticket detail in /support/[id]
